interesting.title: Senior Software Developer, Engineering Productivity Platforms and Devices
interesting.descriptionHtml:
For Canada Applicants:

This posting is for a new vacancy.

Google utilizes AI tools to assist in assessing candidates in our hiring processes.

Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: San Jose, CA, USA; Waterloo, ON, Canada.

interesting.companyDescription:
Since our founding in 1998, Google has grown by leaps and bounds. Starting from two computer science students in a university dorm room, we now have thousands of employees and offices around the world. These Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe.

It starts with how we work together. We’re building a company where people of different views, backgrounds and experiences can do their best work and show up for one another. A place where every Googler feels like they belong.

interesting.title: Software Engineer, Cloud Interconnect Networking
interesting.descriptionHtml:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: Raleigh, NC, USA; Durham, NC, USA.

Minimum qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
  • 2 years of experience working in C++, Python, Go, or a similar language.
  • 2 years of experience with network architectures, protocols (TCP/IP, BGP, etc.) and technologies, as well as concepts like scalability, fault tolerance, and consistency.
  • 2 years of experience with network design, implementation, and troubleshooting.

interesting.title: Application Developer III
interesting.descriptionHtml:
Job Description

SALARY RANGE $190,000 - $247,000/year

DUTIES As a successful candidate for the Application Developer III role, you will be responsible for designing custom software tools and techniques on UNIX/Linux platforms. You will demonstrate a firm understanding of programming CNO tools and techniques, network design, and socket programming, as well as the ability to diagnose and debug issues using both COTS and GOTS tools. You will leverage a strong background in reverse engineering concepts and work closely with analysts, operators, data scientists, and other tactical developers to provide mission-critical support. Additionally, you will mentor junior-level develope

interesting.title: Ingénieur C++ Confirmé – Software Desktop / Multithreading (H/F)
interesting.description_text: Issu.e d’une formation Bac+5, vous justifiez d’une expérience de 4 ans minimum en développement C++ sur des applications complexes. Compétences clés : C++ (idéalement C++17 / C++20) Programmation orientée objet Développement d’applications desktop Multithreading / performance Environnement apprécié : Qt (IHM) Environnement multiplateforme (Windows / Linux / Mac) Git Atouts : OpenGL Mathématiques appliquées (vecteurs, matrices, quaternions) Connaissances en navigation (IMU, GNSS…) Soft skills : Esprit technique et capacité à résoudre des problèmes complexes Curiosité et capacité d’apprentissage Rigueur et autonomie Goût pour les environnements techniques ex

interesting.title: Senior Java Software Engineer
interesting.description_text: Join StrangeBee, a European cybersecurity software company specializing in incident response. As a Senior Java Software Engineer, you will play a key role in the architectural redesign and migration of our backend platform from Scala to Java. You will have direct influence over foundational decisions, engage in feature conception, and establish engineering standards. This is an opportunity to shape the future of our incident response platform and make a meaningful impact in the cybersecurity industry.
interesting.description_html: Join StrangeBee, a European cybersecurity software company specializing in incident response. As a Senior Java Software Engineer, you will play a key role in the architectural redesign and migration of our backend platform from Scala to Java. You will have direct influence over foundational decisions, engage in feature conception, and establish engineering standards. This is an opportunity to shape the future of our incident response platform and make a meaningful impact in the cybersecurity industry.
